name: imlab
description: Interact with the IMLab `im` cluster (Institute of Science Tokyo): submit and monitor Slurm jobs, manage files on the cluster, and search the built-in guide.

interface.shortDescription: Submit and monitor im-cluster Slurm jobs and search the IMLab docs.
interface.longDescription: Interact with the IMLab `im` cluster from Codex: submit and monitor Slurm (CPU/MPI) jobs, manage files on the cluster, and search the built-in guide.
defaultPrompt: Submit a small im test job.
